mainEntity.name: What is the full official nomenclature of the institution?

acceptedAnswer.text: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School.

mainEntity.name: Which legal entity governs the school?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research (MAEER).

mainEntity.name: Where is the physical campus located?

acceptedAnswer.text: At. Rajbaug, Loni Kalbhor, District Pune.

mainEntity.name: What is the total area of the institutional grounds?

acceptedAnswer.text: 125 acres.

mainEntity.name: Why was the 'World School' suffix added to the branding?

acceptedAnswer.text: To clarify the school's status as an IB Continuum institution and prevent confusion with MAEER's CBSE or other MIT-branded entities.

mainEntity.name: Does the institution offer residential facilities?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it is an International Day and Residential School.

mainEntity.name: Who is the current Head of School?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dr. Vidhukesh Vimal, Head of School.

mainEntity.name: What is the registered address of the MAEER Trust?

acceptedAnswer.text: Survey No. 124, Kothrud Paud Road, Ex-Servicemen Colony, Pune-411 038.

mainEntity.name: What is the primary pedagogical framework?

acceptedAnswer.text: The International Baccalaureate (IB).

mainEntity.name: When was the earliest IB program authorized?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Diploma Programme (DP) was originally authorized in May 2006.

mainEntity.name: What programs comprise the school's 'IB Continuum' status?

acceptedAnswer.text: PYP, MYP, DP, and CP.

mainEntity.name: When was the PYP first authorized?

acceptedAnswer.text: April 2009.

mainEntity.name: When was the MYP first authorized?

acceptedAnswer.text: April 2018.

mainEntity.name: What is the original authorization date for the DP?
When was the CP authorized?

acceptedAnswer.text: October 2025.

mainEntity.name: Which year groups does the MYP cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Years 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5.

mainEntity.name: When were current IB certificates reissued?

acceptedAnswer.text: November 2025.

mainEntity.name: Who is the signatory for current IB authorizations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Olli-Pekka Heinonen, Director General.

mainEntity.name: Where is the IB headquarters located for certification purposes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Geneva.

mainEntity.name: Is the IB curriculum used for all grades?

acceptedAnswer.text: The school is authorized for IB for Std. I through Std. XII.

mainEntity.name: Has the school been recognized for its IB implementation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it received the 'Excellence in International Curriculum Practices' award in 2022.

mainEntity.name: What are the foundational benefits of the IB Continuum?

acceptedAnswer.text: A visionary approach to education and holistic student development.

mainEntity.name: Is the Career-related Programme (CP) currently active?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it was authorized in October 2025.

mainEntity.name: How are IB certificates verified for authenticity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Original certificates feature a hologram and a watermark.

mainEntity.name: How many distinct IB programs are offered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Four (PYP, MYP, DP, and CP).

mainEntity.name: What is the status of the school's state recognition?

acceptedAnswer.text: It holds a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Government of Maharashtra.

mainEntity.name: Is Marathi instruction mandatory?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, as a subject from Std I to X.

mainEntity.name: What is the regulatory requirement for inclusive education?

acceptedAnswer.text: 'Divyang' children must be integrated into every class.

mainEntity.name: What is the mandate regarding regional history?

acceptedAnswer.text: History of Maharashtra must be taught.

mainEntity.name: Where is the fee structure publicly disclosed?

acceptedAnswer.text: On the Government's RTE portal.

mainEntity.name: Does the school follow the RTE Act 2009?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, as mandated by NOC conditions 1 and 2.

mainEntity.name: How is student data tracked by the state?

acceptedAnswer.text: Through the SARAL and U-DISE databases.

mainEntity.name: Under what conditions can the NOC be revoked?

acceptedAnswer.text: If there is any deviation from state rules or instructions, without prior notice.

mainEntity.name: What was the school's Education World rank for 2023-24?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. 4 in India and No. 2 in Maharashtra.

mainEntity.name: What was the Education World rank for 2025-26?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. 4 in India and No. 1 in Maharashtra.

mainEntity.name: Who received the 24th World Education Summit award for the school?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mr. Udayan Verma.

mainEntity.name: In which NATGEO program was the school featured?

acceptedAnswer.text: 'The Future School.'

mainEntity.name: When was the 'School of the Year' title awarded?
What was the Silicon India ranking achievement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Top 10 Most Promising Residential Schools (2022).

mainEntity.name: What were the 2025 Education Today ranks?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. 2 in Maharashtra and No. 2 in Pune.

mainEntity.name: Which summit awarded the school in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The New Age Summit.

mainEntity.name: What is the significance of the 'Dynamic Schools 2024' award?

acceptedAnswer.text: It recognizes exemplary contribution to education in Maharashtra.

mainEntity.name: How many sports disciplines are supported by the campus infrastructure?

acceptedAnswer.text: 20+ sports.

mainEntity.name: How does the school ensure safety compliance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Following guidelines from Police, Fire Services, and the Transport Department.

mainEntity.name: Does the school have a sexual harassment policy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, a Complaint Redressal Committee is formed as per state mandates.

mainEntity.name: Is student Aadhar registration required?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, registration on the SARAL portal is mandatory.

mainEntity.name: What is the Sanskrit motto on the official logo?

acceptedAnswer.text: tejasvinavadhitamastu (rendered in Devanagari on the official logo).

mainEntity.name: Who presented the 2022 Hyderabad award?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mr. Augus P Saptoo and Shri Navin Mittal.
